introSection: Jumbo Jet was a steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schwarzkopf that was previously located at Ölands Djur & Nöjespark in Färjestaden, Kalmar, Sweden.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Pistachio track and purple supports. Red track and blue supports at Gröna Lund.

fullText:
Jumbo Jet was a steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schwarzkopf that was previously located at Ölands Djur & Nöjespark in Färjestaden, Kalmar, Sweden.



Pistachio track and purple supports. Red track and blue supports at Gröna Lund.
